parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { response_mime_type: 'application/json' } }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT name, family, qty, critical FROM items WHERE NOT archived AND (name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR tr ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%') ORDER BY name LIMIT 10
SELECT id, product_name, qty, status, created_at::date AS tarih FROM production_orders WHERE status IN ('planned','active') ORDER BY id

parameters.jsCode:
const prompt = `Sen AquaOps'sun: Aquatronic firmasinin Telegram uzerindeki kucuk yardimci botusun. Kisa (en fazla 4-5 cumle), samimi, Turkce cevap ver. Stok/uretim emri/kur sorulari icin ayri komutlarin oldugunu gerektiginde hatirlat.\n\nKullanici: ${$json.mesaj}`;
return [{ json: { prompt } }];
